faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open 11:30 AM - 11:00 PM, 7 days a week.

faqs.question: Do you accept reservations?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept table reservations for parties of 2-8 guests. Walk-ins are also welcome.

faqs.question: Is there parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have valet parking and a nearby public parking garage.

faqs.question: Do you offer vegetarian options?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our menu features several vegetarian and vegan options.

faqs.question: Can I host a private event?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a private dining room that seats up to 30 guests. Contact us for details.

faqs.question: Do you offer takeout and delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, takeout is available. Delivery via UberEats and DoorDash.

items.name: Hummus with Lamb
items.description: Creamy hummus topped with spiced minced lamb and pine nuts

items.name: Fatoush Salad
items.description: Fresh vegetables with crispy pita and sumac dressing

items.name: Lamb Ouzi
items.description: Slow-cooked lamb with spiced rice, nuts, and raisins

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Creamy tomato curry with tender chicken pieces

items.name: Baklava Assortment
items.description: Selection of pistachio and walnut baklava with honey

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open 12:00 PM - 12:00 AM, 7 days a week.

faqs.question: Do you have halal certification?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our meat is halal certified.

faqs.question: Is there a dress code?
faqs.answer: Smart casual is recommended. No beachwear please.

faqs.question: Do you offer shisha?
faqs.answer: Yes, shisha is available on our outdoor terrace.

faqs.question: Can I host a business meeting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have private meeting rooms available for booking.

faqs.question: Do you offer valet parking?
faqs.answer: Yes, complimentary valet parking is available.

restaurants.tagline: Modern British Cuisine with a View

items.name: Fish & Chips Bites
items.description: Mini beer-battered cod with mushy peas and tartar sauce

items.name: Scotch Eggs
items.description: Soft boiled egg wrapped in sausage meat with runny yolk

items.name: Fish Pie
items.description: Creamy salmon, cod, and haddock topped with mashed potatoes

items.name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
items.description: Warm date pudding with butterscotch sauce and vanilla ice cream

items.name: English Afternoon Tea
items.description: Selection of teas with finger sandwiches and scones

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: We are open 10:00 AM - 10:30 PM, 7 days a week.

faqs.question: Is there a view of the harbor?
faqs.answer: Yes, our terrace offers beautiful harbor views.

faqs.question: Do you accommodate dietary restrictions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer gluten-free, dairy-free, and vegetarian options.

faqs.question: Is there outdoor seating?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have a heated outdoor terrace.

faqs.question: Do you take large group bookings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can accommodate groups up to 40 people.

faqs.question: Are dogs allowed?
faqs.answer: Well-behaved dogs are welcome on our terrace.
